deliverable: Pre-build CI Validation and Config Fixes
rationale: The build pipeline is currently blocked due to a configuration bug, and there are critical gaps in ISO size validation. Implementing a pre-build validation job prevents costly CI resource waste.

implementation_steps.description: Fix the `DatabaseRequired` build blocker in `pacman.conf` by setting the global `SigLevel` to `Required DatabaseOptional`.

Add a `test` job to `.github/workflows/build-iso.yml` that executes all pre-build scripts (`tests/verify_*.sh`), explicitly excluding ISO-dependent scripts (`verify_iso_smoketest.sh`, `verify_iso_grub.sh`, `verify_iso_size.sh`).
Ensure the `build` job depends on (`needs:`) the new `test` job.

constraints: Do not modify the installed system's configuration (`airootfs/etc/pacman.conf`).
Pre-build validation scripts must execute before the main ISO build step.
Do not alter ISO compression settings in `profiledef.sh`.
